pages.latin_text: Multae cicādae ūnō diē ōtiōsae erant. Nihil novum erat.
pages.english_text: Many cicadas were bored one day. Nothing was new.
pages.image_prompt: A sunny field with several small brown cicadas resting on grass stalks, looking bored. Warm sunlight, soft yellow tones, simple background of green hills and sky. Center composition, gentle mood.

pages.latin_text: Itaque omnēs ad oppidum proximum volāvērunt.
pages.english_text: So they all flew to the nearby town.
pages.image_prompt: Group of cicadas flying together toward a small brown-and-yellow town in the distance. Eye-level angle, bright blue sky, motion lines showing flight, cheerful tone.

pages.latin_text: Ibī hominēs timidī et trīstēs erant.
pages.english_text: There, the people were afraid and sad.
pages.image_prompt: Simple town square with a few villagers looking frightened and frowning. Soft colors, houses with red roofs, gentle afternoon light.

pages.latin_text: Dracō eōs terrēbat. Habitābat in monte prope oppidum. Caverna erat magna et obscūra.
pages.english_text: A dragon scared them. It lived in a mountain near the town. The cave was large and dark.
pages.image_prompt: Red dragon peeking out from a dark cave in a rocky mountain above a small town. The cave mouth is shadowy; dragon eyes glowing faintly. Warm light on the town below, cooler tones for the cave.

pages.latin_text: Cicādae inter sē dīxērunt: “Eāmus! Dracōnem vincāmus!”
pages.english_text: The cicadas said to each other: 'Let’s go! Let’s defeat the dragon!'
pages.image_prompt: Cicadas gathered together in a small circle, wings raised in determination. Simple grassy ground, bright sunlight, expressions of courage.

pages.latin_text: Itaque omnēs ad montem volāvērunt. Ventus fortis erat, sed nōn timuērunt.
pages.english_text: So they all flew to the mountain. The wind was strong, but they were not afraid.
pages.image_prompt: Cicadas flying upward toward a rocky mountain in gusty wind. Grass and leaves bending, bright sky with motion. Slight diagonal composition for action.

pages.latin_text: Cicādae intrāvērunt cavernam. Tenebrās vīdērunt et nihil aliud.
pages.english_text: The cicadas entered the cave. They saw darkness and nothing else.
pages.image_prompt: Inside a dark cave with the small glow of light behind the entering cicadas. Cave walls simple and rocky; mood quiet and dim with gentle shadows.

pages.latin_text: Per obscūra forāmina et longa itinera ambulāvērunt.
pages.english_text: They walked through dark tunnels and long paths.
pages.image_prompt: Cicadas moving carefully through winding cave tunnels. Dim warm torchlight or glowing stones guiding the way. Narrow perspective to show depth.

pages.latin_text: Tandem invēnērunt cubīle dracōnis. Dracō dormiēbat super acervum aurī.
pages.english_text: At last they found the dragon’s lair. The dragon was sleeping on a pile of gold.
pages.image_prompt: Dragon curled up asleep on glittering gold coins and treasures. Soft warm light reflecting off gold. Cicadas peeking from behind rocks in the corner.

pages.latin_text: Aurum et gemmae fulgēbant. Dracō ruber erat et dentēs magnī erant eī.
pages.english_text: The gold and gems sparkled. The dragon was red and had large teeth.
pages.image_prompt: Close-up of the red dragon sleeping with mouth partly open, showing sharp teeth. Gold and gems sparkling beneath it. Warm colors, gentle contrast.

pages.latin_text: Cicādae super dracōnem volāvērunt. Eum pungēre temptāvērunt, sed frūstrā.
pages.english_text: The cicadas flew above the dragon. They tried to sting it, but in vain.
pages.image_prompt: Small cicadas darting around the dragon, attempting to poke or sting. Dragon slightly stirring, still half-asleep. Action-filled composition, soft edges.

pages.latin_text: Dracō excitātus est et īrātus factus est. Rugīvit valdē et ālās mōvit.
pages.english_text: The dragon woke up and became angry. It roared loudly and moved its wings.
pages.image_prompt: Dragon roaring in fury inside the cave, wings outspread. Gold coins flying from the ground. Strong diagonal composition, warm red light.

pages.latin_text: Per antrum volāvit, mordēns et unguēs vibrāns. Multās cicādās occīdit.
pages.english_text: It flew through the cave, biting and swinging its claws. It killed many cicadas.
pages.image_prompt: Action scene with dragon sweeping through the air, claws extended. A few cicadas fleeing in panic. Motion blur lines, dim cave background.

pages.latin_text: Ceterae cicādae tremēbant et cōnsilium quaesīvērunt.
pages.english_text: The remaining cicadas trembled and sought a plan.
pages.image_prompt: Group of surviving cicadas huddled together on a rock, looking worried. Cave background dark but not frightening, soft light on them.

pages.latin_text: Antōnius, ūna cicāda fortis, dīxit: “Strīdāmus omnēs simul!”
pages.english_text: Antonius, one brave cicada, said: 'Let’s all buzz together!'
pages.image_prompt: Close-up of Antonius the cicada standing tall and brave, wings lifted as he speaks to the others. Warm light on his face, hopeful tone.

pages.latin_text: Antōnius prīmus strīdit. Deinde omnēs cicādae fortiter strīdēbant.
pages.english_text: Antonius buzzed first. Then all the cicadas buzzed loudly.
pages.image_prompt: Cicadas surrounding the dragon, wings vibrating powerfully, visible sound waves or motion lines to show buzzing. The dragon flinches slightly.

pages.latin_text: Sonus magnus tōtam cavernam implēvit. Aurēs dracōnis doluērunt.
pages.english_text: A great sound filled the whole cave. The dragon’s ears hurt.
pages.image_prompt: Dragon covering its ears in pain as glowing waves of sound fill the cave. Bright yellows and soft blues to show echoing sound. Simple layout.

pages.latin_text: Dracō īnsānīvit et sine mente volāvit. In parietem cavernae volāvit et cecidit.
pages.english_text: The dragon went mad and flew without sense. It crashed into the cave wall and fell.
pages.image_prompt: Dragon flying wildly, eyes wide, crashing into a stone wall. Gold scattering through the air. Dramatic action but soft, child-safe tone.

pages.latin_text: Dracō mortuus est. Cicādae gāvīsae sunt.
pages.english_text: The dragon was dead. The cicadas rejoiced.
pages.image_prompt: Dragon lying still in the background, while cicadas dance and flutter with joy near the cave entrance. Warm morning light entering the cave.

pages.latin_text: Ad oppidum rediērunt et strīdēbant: “Dracō mortuus est!”
pages.english_text: They returned to the town and buzzed: 'The dragon is dead!'
pages.image_prompt: Cicadas flying joyfully back into the town, villagers looking up and smiling. Soft sunlight, simple town background, celebratory feeling.

pages.latin_text: Hominēs laetī erant et grātiās ēgērunt.
pages.english_text: The people were happy and gave thanks.
pages.image_prompt: Villagers with open arms and smiling faces thanking the cicadas. Warm colors, simple cobblestone street, soft afternoon light.

pages.latin_text: Aurum cēpērunt et inter sē dīvīsērunt.
pages.english_text: They took the gold and shared it among themselves.
pages.image_prompt: Villagers carrying gold coins from baskets, sharing them kindly. Simple town square, children and elders smiling. Warm browns and yellows.

pages.latin_text: Omnēs laetī erant. Cicādae carmen laetum strīdēbant.
pages.english_text: Everyone was happy. The cicadas buzzed a joyful song.
pages.image_prompt: Cicadas on tree branches outside the bright town, singing under a golden sunset. Peaceful mood, warm colors, final celebratory tone.
